failure_modes.cause: BPR set below required pressure, leading to potential flow instability
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle at least 16.8 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T=120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation or solid formation in 0.4 mm diameter tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement inline filtration and regular cleaning protocol

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Test BPR at 20 bar with solvent flow to ensure stability and no leakage
Run blank solvent at Q=3.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct flow test with 0.4 mm tubing using a suspension to check for blockages
